name: 650 MG Acetaminophen Tablets IP
about: The 650 MG Acetaminophen Tablets IP are a type of general medicine that contains 650mg of acetaminophen per tablet. This medicine is commonly used to relieve pain and reduce fever. The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. The tablets come in a physical form that is easy to swallow and can be stored in a dry and cool place. The medicine is sourced from India and comes in a packaging quantity of 20x10 tablets per box.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for the 650 MG Acetaminophen Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the main drug used in the 650 MG Acetaminophen Tablets IP?
faq.a: The main drug used in this medicine is acetaminophen.

faq.q: Can this medicine be used to reduce fever?
faq.a: Yes, this medicine can be used to reduce fever.

faq.q: What is the storage instruction for the 650 MG Acetaminophen Tablets IP?
faq.a: The medicine should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the packaging quantity for the 650 MG Acetaminophen Tablets IP?
faq.a: The packaging quantity for this medicine is 20x10 tablets per box.
